Agreement
PARTICIPATION AGREEMENT AND LIABILITY WAIVER MASTER BAEZ MARTIAL ARTS I, the undersigned, understand and agree to the following terms when enrolling in programs at MASTER BAEZ MARTIAL ARTS: 1. INHERENT RISK: I acknowledge that physical activities carry a risk of injury. 2. LIABILITY RELEASE: On behalf of myself and my heirs, I release MASTER BAEZ MARTIAL ARTS, its instructors and staff from any liability for injuries or damages that may occur during participation. 3. MEDICAL AUTHORIZATION: In case of emergency, I authorize MASTER BAEZ MARTIAL ARTS to obtain necessary medical care. 4. PHOTO AND VIDEO: I consent to MASTER BAEZ MARTIAL ARTS using images and videos of the participant for promotional purposes. 5. COMMITMENT: I agree to follow the rules of conduct and respect established by MASTER BAEZ MARTIAL ARTS.
